General.Name: Honliv Healthcare Management
General.Description: Honliv Healthcare Management Group Company Limited engages in the ownership, operation, and management of hospitals in the People's Republic of China. It provides integrated medical and pharmaceutical services; hospital management services; and maternal and infant nursing services. The company also operates as a pharmaceutical wholesaler. In addition, it operates and manages Henan Honliv Hospital. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Changyuan, China. Honliv Healthcare Management Group Company Limited is a subsidiary of Sunny Rock Capital Limited.
General.Address: No. 8, Bo Ai Road (South), Changyuan, China
